Extra Padding.description: Increases armor rating by approximately 50 points.

Scout.description: Reduces enemy detection range by 30%. Increases movement speed while crouching.

Servo-Assisted.description: +30% limb health. +50% throwing range for stratagems and grenades.

Engineering Kit.description: +2 grenade capacity. +30% explosive resistance. Grants extra padding for explosives.

Fortified.description: +50% explosive resistance. Reduced recoil while crouching or prone.

Med-Kit.description: +2 stim capacity. Stims take effect faster. Slightly faster stim animation.

Democracy Protects.description: Chance to survive a lethal hit with 1 HP. Provides a small buffer against death.

Peak Physique.description: Melee attacks deal more damage. Reloading/weapon handling slightly faster.

Electrical Conduit.description: Greatly reduces damage taken from electrical/arc attacks.

Inflammable.description: Dramatically reduces fire damage taken. Near immunity to burn status effect.

Advanced Filtration.description: Provides immunity to toxic/gas environmental hazards and enemy gas attacks.

Gunslinger.description: Significantly reduces sidearm swap and draw time. Faster pistol handling.

Siege-Ready.description: +30% primary weapon magazine count. Never run out during sustained combat.

Unflinching.description: Reduces flinch/stagger from incoming fire. Maintain aim under heavy attack.

Supplementary Adrenaline.description: Stims restore health over time after activation in addition to immediate effect.

Concussive Padding.description: Reduces stagger/knockback from explosive damage significantly.

Feet First.description: Increases Hellpod accuracy. Survive higher-velocity impacts when deploying.

Integrated Explosives.description: Hellpod impact explodes for area damage. Dive-bomb enemies on insertion.

Ballistic Padding.description: Increases resistance to ballistic damage from enemy projectiles.

Desert Stormer.description: Reduces movement penalty in sand/desert terrain. Heat resistance.

Rock Solid.description: Reduces movement penalty on rocky terrain. Improved footing on unstable ground.

Reduced Signature.description: Reduces sensor detection range. Enemies are slower to identify you.

Acclimated.description: Adapts to environmental conditions faster, reducing debuffs.

Adreno-Defibrillator.description: Upon taking a lethal hit, triggers an automatic adrenaline burst granting short invincibility.

Ground Anchor.description: Greatly reduces knockback from heavy impacts, explosions, and charges.

Vitamin Injectors.description: Stims apply 30% faster. Slight passive health regeneration over time.
